CommunityApplications.Profile:
Unraid Community Applications templates for [gramps-web-mcp](https://github.com/Scormave/gramps-web-mcp) — an MCP server that gives AI agents structured access to [Gramps Web](https://www.grampsweb.org/) family trees.
Report issues with the container image or MCP server on the [main project](https://github.com/Scormave/gramps-web-mcp/issues). Use this repository for template-specific problems.
